subject: Quick follow-up on that Architecture Generator
body:
Hey there,

Hope you've had a chance to try out the Claude Code Skill we put together. We built it because we kept drawing the same architecture diagrams over and over, and figured others probably did too.

If you're into automation at all, we just published a guide on automation tools for small business that might spark some ideas for what to build next. Stop by mini-on-ai.com whenever you get a moment—we're always working on new resources.
